title: Responses Runner V2 Supervisor Stage Outcome

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier for this artifact contract.

outcome_id.description: Stable identifier for a classified stage outcome.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this artifact was created.

run_id.description: Stable identifier for one workflow run.

stage_id.description: Stable identifier for the workflow stage.

classification.description: Supervisor classification for the stage outcome.

detection_signals.description: Signals used to classify this stage outcome.

item.description: Describes the `item` field for this artifact contract.

passed.description: Describes the `passed` field for this artifact contract.

detail.description: Describes the `detail` field for this artifact contract.

path.description: Describes the `path` field for this artifact contract.

completeness_checklist.description: Checks used to determine whether artifacts are complete and reviewable.

action.description: Recommended recovery, review, or continuation action.

reviewable.description: Whether the stage artifact is eligible for substantive review.

review_bundle_allowed.description: Whether an approved review bundle may be created from this outcome.

rerun_allowed.description: Whether the supervisor permits a rerun for this outcome.

human_pause_required.description: Whether this outcome requires a human-pause artifact.

human_pause.description: Human-pause artifact associated with this outcome, if any.

checkpoint_path.description: Repository-relative path to the stage checkpoint used for classification.

description: Responses Runner V2 Supervisor Stage Outcome JSON schema.
